title: Plaztick
body:
## What is Plaztick?

Plaztick is a resource pack that I'm working on that, once it's completely finished, will make Minecraft look more like everything's made out of plastic. As well as that I'm putting some of my own things into it such as using CTM (Connected Textures Mod) to make, well, connecting textures. All you need to get these connecting textures is to either download the mod itself, or use something that already has the mod, such as Optifine or Sodium. 

 

Plaztick overall has simpler and more colorful textures, going for a glossy, clean look.

 

## Is it finished?

Currently, as of the time writing this, no. But I've done quite a lot. Only blocks have been changed, no items, models, or UI elements have been altered.

 

## I think I found a bug...

Feel Free to Contact me through email at Mantadan.CSP@gmail.com or through my GitHub account!
 

Thanks for downloading Plaztick!

![This is an image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/437/324/plaztick-header.png)
